\tzpentry{ID3587}{Gyromagnetic Current Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3587 introduces Gyromagnetic Current Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \vec{J}_{\text{gyro}}(\vec{r}', t) = \rho(\vec{r}') \vec{\omega}_{\text{gyro}}(t) \times \vec{r}' \end{equation}
